message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceDiagram

participant DailyBankMainFrame as "DailyBankMainFrame"
participant EmployeesManagement as "EmployeesManagement"
participant EmployeesManagementController as "EmployeesManagementController"
participant ListView as "ListView"
participant ObservableList as "ObservableList"
participant AlertUtilities as "AlertUtilities"
participant Alert as "Alert"
participant AccessEmployee as "AccessEmployee"

DailyBankMainFrame->>EmployeesManagement: doEmployeManagementDialog()
EmployeesManagement->>EmployeesManagementController: displayDialog()
EmployeesManagementController->>ListView: getSelectionModel()
EmployeesManagementController-->>ListView: (back)
EmployeesManagementController->>ObservableList: get()
EmployeesManagementController-->>ObservableList: (back)
EmployeesManagementController->>AlertUtilities: confirmYesCancel()
AlertUtilities->>Alert: showAndWait()
AlertUtilities-->>AlertUtilities: (back)
EmployeesManagementController->>EmployeesManagement: suppressorEmploye()
EmployeesManagement->>EmployeesManagementController: remove()
EmployeesManagementController->>AccessEmployee: deleteEmploye()

@enduml
